mano_cua.result_summary: 无法在浏览器约束内测试：页面所有demo为只读预编译React演示，无交互式编辑器修改accept为application/ld+json；同时无法在不使用Finder/Terminal/DevTools的情况下创建或拖拽.jsonld文件
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Since all sections are read-only demos, there's no way to modify the accept prop to application/ld+json without using the browser console (DevTools - prohibited) or editing source files via Terminal (prohibited). Furthermore, to drag a .jsonld file, I would need to have such a file available on the filesystem (requires Finder or Terminal to create one - prohibited) or simulate the drag via JavaScript (requires DevTools - prohibited). Given these constraints, this task cannot be completed within the browser-only limitation specified.
